title: Option `--network-cmd-path` was not removed in Podman 5.0
body:
### Issue Description

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/43fe3ebaf3403ac402cbe1e9e4d58c2d567c659a/docs/source/markdown/podman.1.md?plain=1#L101-L104

From the text above:
_This option is deprecated and will be removed with Podman 5.0_

The option is still available in Podman 5.2.1.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. `podman --network-cmd-path=/usr/bin/pasta info -f json | jq -r .host.slirp4netns.executable`



### Describe the results you received

This is written to stdout
```
/usr/bin/pasta
 ```

### Describe the results you expected

This is written to stderr
```
Error: unknown flag: --network-cmd-path
```

Additional environment details

### Additional information

comments.body:
The option cannot be removed until the next major version. As such I suggest to simply drop the line stating so.
In general there is little work required to keep this option around so I see no reason to remove it currently.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I would like to work on this issue.
